Clinic Reception.name: City Vet Clinic — Reception
Clinic Reception.description: The smell of bleach and old fur is overwhelming. Faded anatomical posters of dogs and cats peel from the walls. A swinging door leads to the examination area in the back.
Clinic Reception.first_entry_text:
The clinic is supposed to be closed today, but the front door was unlocked.

You hear a heavy metallic crash in the back room, followed by a frantic voice.

furniture.name: Reception Desk
furniture.description: Covered in appointment books, flea medication pamphlets, and a boarding schedule for a dog named Goomba. There's a computer monitor tucked behind the counter.

objects.name: computer monitor
objects.description: The screen saver is bouncing around. Briefly, the bouncing logo morphs into a skull before returning to the clinic logo.

Examination Room.name: Examination Room
Examination Room.description: Sterile and blindingly bright. A heavy stainless steel examination table sits in the center of the room. A large, reinforced medicine cabinet dominates the back wall, sitting next to a row of tall green cylinders.

furniture.name: Examination Table
furniture.description: Cold steel. There are faint scratch marks on the surface from terrified animals.

furniture.name: Medicine Cabinet
furniture.description: A heavy glass-fronted cabinet. The shelves are packed with sedatives, adrenaline, and surgical supplies.
